stemHtml: A CAT operator requires specialist work (which falls under the scope of the CAT operator’s approval) to be carried out by an outside contractor. Which of the following options is correct?

options.a: A written agreement should exist between the operator and the contracted organisation.
options.b: An oral agreement should exist between the operator and the contracted organisation.
options.c: An oral and written agreement should exist between the operator and the contracted organisation.
options.d: A financial oral and written agreement should exist between the operator and the contracted organisation.
